nasb.text: Then they tore their clothes, and when each man loaded his donkey, they returned to the city.

esv.text: Then they tore their clothes, and every man loaded his donkey, and they returned to the city.

cnv.text: 他們就撕裂自己的衣服，各人又把擔子馱在驢上，回城去了。

ccb.text: 他们伤心地撕裂衣服，把东西放回驴背上，返回城里。

csbs.text: 他们就撕裂自己的衣服，各人把东西驮在驴上，又回到城里。
